title: Rhythm: full markup paragraph
description: Rhythm exercise with HTML + code + prose mixed
text:
Welcome!

The site is open at https://my.app/start. Type {user: "name"} into the box. Press Enter.

tips.target: Type {user: "name"} into the box. Press Enter.

character_tips.anna: Web copy + tags + JSON — a typical webpage source.
character_tips.maxim: Modern coding = mixed media: markup, prose, data. All in one paragraph.
character_tips.knopych: MEGA MIX! Tags + words + data! Web flow! 🌊
character_tips.klavochka: All the symbols dancing together! What a show! 🎭
